lood count • Place the blood smear slide under the microscope and focus it to 70x magnification. • Once you have isolated a portion of the smear, count the number of each type of blood cell. Record the numbers below Note: Platlets may not be visible at this magnification • RBC: _________Neutrophils: _________ • Basophils: _________Eosinophils: _________ • Monocytes: _________Lymphocytes: _________ STATION FIVE: HEART DISSECTION • Observe and identify all the surface anatomy of the heart. • Orientate the heart so that the ventral side is facing you. The base of the heart should be positioned right side up for dissection. HUMAN ANATOMY LAB MANUAL 107
